title: dissotidendron caloneurum var. caloneurum
intro: Dissotidendron caloneurum var. caloneurum is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, commonly known as the 'Bitter Ash'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its bitter compounds which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and stimulate the appetite. The health benefits of Dissotidendron caloneurum var. caloneurum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions, as well as being included in various tinctures and supplements, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
